{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Strands of Fate
| introduced = cradle-09-bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Strands of Fate]] are all possible futures.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18">''Bloodline'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
